TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Diana, title = Diana, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Diana} }

S.FORM: == Diana, Princess of Wales 威爾士王妃戴安娜 == I 1961 a miheca saka pito folad saka 1 a romi'ad masofoc ci Diana, polong a ngangan ni Diana(ikelis:Lady Diana Frances Spencer), malamikomoday a tamdaw, O sawara'an no kitakit no England, O saka cecay a fafahi ni Wales Hongti ci Diana, tatosa ko wawa nangra, ci Wilien ato ci Hali. O ciharatengay cifaloco'ay to pakayni to demak i hekal, kaolahan no tamdamdaw cingra. Kasofocan ni Diana itini i England a lalomaan, 'aloman ko mikeriday a palatamdaw cingraan, I 1981 a mihecaan malasingsi ho no Yociing cingra i, patikong to cingra to sakakaay a wawa ni Elizabeth II ci Wiese, I Sen-Paw-lo tata'akay a kiwkay ko pitikong nangra, malakakeridan no England a kitakit, o tadakahemekan to tamdamdaw. Nikaorira, caay ka fangcal ko kalaramod ni Diana aci Wiese, iraay ko roma a fafahiyan mirawraw to kalaramod nangra, saka itini to i 1992 mihecaan satapang to malacinowas a mafoti', caay ka halafin, malacinowas to cangra i 1996 a mihecaan. Malakakeridan no kitakit ci Diana i, ciinorongay cingra to finawlan, maolah ci Diana to mato'asay ato kaemangay, o roma i, pakayni to demak no ciadadaay to no , 'alomanay to ko mafana'ay to mitayalan ningra, sa'aya'ayaw i, mangodo ho cingra a mikihatiya to ciadadaay tonian a tamdaw, mananam mananam to ko 'alomanay a tamdaw cingraan i, safangcal sato ko faloco' ningra to kalacinowas no kalalamod. kasafocan a loma' 出生家庭 Itini i 1961 a mihecaan saka pito folad saka cecay a romi'ad a hofocen ci Dayana(no Ikilis a nganga:Diana Frances Spencer), i Park House, Sandringham, Norfolk ko kahofocan ningra. lalamod 配偶 salikaka 兄弟姐妹 natayalan 事蹟 kapatayan 逝世 1997 mihacaan falo folad 31 a romi'ad to kanikaran, itini tona laloma'ay no pongkang tahasotol to paliding ko kapatay ni Diana. Oya parakatay to paliding ningra ci Hengli Polo hananay i, tangsol a mapatay, midipangay ci Dianaan a tamdaw, ci Telefo Lise CiyongSe kareteng ko doka', ladaka'ay ko tireng ningra. ira to ko roma a sowal masadak i tilifi, o mirepelan no sapilicayaw to demak ni Diana, malarepel cangara i caay ka pina'on parakat to paliding, masasontol to, onini ko kapatay ni Diana. I 1999 a maheca, ira to a makera nangra ko kacirawraw noya parakatay to paliding, koma'enay to 'epah ci Polo toya romi'ad saka malasang parakat haca to paliding, tata'akay karetengay ko raraw ningra. koma'enay ci Polo to sapitelep to katatiih no tireng ningra, latek o sapaiyo ato 'epah ko mili'angay to fongoh ningra, kali'ki sato a malasang ko fongoh ningra. I 2008 a miheca, ira to ko pisetekan no citodongay to pakayni tonian a demak, tata'akay ko raraw ni Pulo ato yamireperay cangranan a tamdaw, oya ci Telefo Lise CiyongSe midipangay ci Dianaan i, pitooran 宗教
S.PHON: == ɬ~ɮiana, prinʦəss o~uf waɾəs ******** == i **** a miħəʦa saka pito~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi ɬ~ɮiana, po~uɾo~uŋ a ŋaŋan ni ɬ~ɮiana(ikəɾis:ɾaɬ~ɮj ɬ~ɮiana franʦəs spənʦər), maɾamiko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit no~u əŋɾanɬ~ɮ, o~u saka ʦəʦaj a fafaħi ni waɾəs ħo~uŋti ʦi ɬ~ɮiana, tato~usa ko~u wawa naŋra, ʦi wiɾiən ato~u ʦi ħaɾi. o~u ʦiħaratəŋaj ʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡaj to~u pakajni to~u ɬ~ɮəmak i ħəkaɾ, kao~uɾaħan no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw ʦiŋra. kaso~ufo~uʦan ni ɬ~ɮiana itini i əŋɾanɬ~ɮ a ɾaɾo~umaan, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj a paɾatamɬ~ɮaw ʦiŋraan, i **** a miħəʦaan maɾasiŋsi ħo~u no~u jo~uʦiiŋ ʦiŋra i, patiko~uŋ to~u ʦiŋra to~u sakakaaj a wawa ni əɾi*ab~b~vətħ ii ʦi wiəsə, i sən-paw-ɾo~u tataʡakaj a kiwkaj ko~u pitiko~uŋ naŋra, maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan no~u əŋɾanɬ~ɮ a kitakit, o~u taɬ~ɮakaħəməkan to~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw. nikao~urira, ʦaaj ka faŋʦaɾ ko~u kaɾaramo~uɬ~ɮ ni ɬ~ɮiana aʦi wiəsə, iraaj ko~u ro~uma a fafaħijan mirawraw to~u kaɾaramo~uɬ~ɮ naŋra, saka itini to~u i **** miħəʦaan satapaŋ to~u maɾaʦino~uwas a mafo~utiʡ, ʦaaj ka ħaɾafin, maɾaʦino~uwas to~u ʦaŋra i **** a miħəʦaan. maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan no~u kitakit ʦi ɬ~ɮiana i, ʦiino~uro~uŋaj ʦiŋra to~u finawɾan, mao~uɾaħ ʦi ɬ~ɮiana to~u mato~uʡasaj ato~u kaəmaŋaj, o~u ro~uma i, pakajni to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj to~u no~u , ʡaɾo~umanaj to~u ko~u mafanaʡaj to~u mitajaɾan niŋra, saʡajaʡajaw i, maŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u ħo~u ʦiŋra a mikiħatija to~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj to~unian a tamɬ~ɮaw, mananam mananam to~u ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦiŋraan i, safaŋʦaɾ sato~u ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ niŋra to~u kaɾaʦino~uwas no~u kaɾaɾamo~uɬ~ɮ. kasafo~uʦan a ɾo~umaʡ **** itini i **** a miħəʦaan saka pito~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ʦəʦaj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a ħo~ufo~uʦən ʦi ɬ~ɮajana(no~u ikiɾis a ŋaŋa:ɬ~ɮiana franʦəs spənʦər), i park ħo~uo~u~usə, sanɬ~ɮriŋħam, no~urfo~uɾk ko~u kaħo~ufo~uʦan niŋra. ɾaɾamo~uɬ~ɮ ** saɾikaka **** natajaɾan ** kapatajan ** **** miħaʦaan faɾo~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u kanikaran, itini to~una ɾaɾo~umaʡaj no~u po~uŋkaŋ taħaso~uto~uɾ to~u paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ ko~u kapataj ni ɬ~ɮiana. o~uja parakataj to~u paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ niŋra ʦi ħəŋɾi po~uɾo~u ħananaj i, taŋso~uɾ a mapataj, miɬ~ɮipaŋaj ʦi ɬ~ɮianaan a tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦi təɾəfo~u ɾisə ʦijo~uŋsə karətəŋ ko~u ɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ, ɾaɬ~ɮakaʡaj ko~u tirəŋ niŋra. ira to~u ko~u ro~uma a so~uwaɾ masaɬ~ɮak i tiɾifi, o~u mirəpəɾan no~u sapiɾiʦajaw to~u ɬ~ɮəmak ni ɬ~ɮiana, maɾarəpəɾ ʦaŋara i ʦaaj ka pinaʡo~un parakat to~u paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ, masaso~unto~uɾ to~u, o~unini ko~u kapataj ni ɬ~ɮiana. i **** a maħəʦa, ira to~u a makəra naŋra ko~u kaʦirawraw no~uja parakataj to~u paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ, ko~umaʡənaj to~u ʡəpaħ ʦi po~uɾo~u to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ saka maɾasaŋ parakat ħaʦa to~u paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ, tataʡakaj karətəŋaj ko~u raraw niŋra. ko~umaʡənaj ʦi po~uɾo~u to~u sapitəɾəp to~u katatiiħ no~u tirəŋ niŋra, ɾatək o~u sapaijo~u ato~u ʡəpaħ ko~u miɾiʡaŋaj to~u fo~uŋo~uħ niŋra, kaɾiʡki sato~u a maɾasaŋ ko~u fo~uŋo~uħ niŋra. i **** a miħəʦa, ira to~u ko~u pisətəkan no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u pakajni to~unian a ɬ~ɮəmak, tataʡakaj ko~u raraw ni po~u~uɾo~u ato~u jamirəpəraj ʦaŋranan a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~uja ʦi təɾəfo~u ɾisə ʦijo~uŋsə miɬ~ɮipaŋaj ʦi ɬ~ɮianaan i, pito~uo~uran **
S.FORM: == Diana, Princess of Wales 威爾士王妃戴安娜 == I 1961 a miheca saka pito folad saka 1 a romi'ad masofoc ci Diana, polong a ngangan ni Diana(ikelis:Lady Diana Frances Spencer), malamikomoday a tamdaw, O sawara'an no kitakit no England, O saka cecay a fafahi ni Wales Hongti ci Diana, tatosa ko wawa nangra, ci Wilien ato ci Hali. O ciharatengay cifaloco'ay to pakayni to demak i hekal, kaolahan no tamdamdaw cingra. Kasofocan ni Diana itini i England a lalomaan, 'aloman ko mikeriday a palatamdaw cingraan, I 1981 a mihecaan malasingsi ho no Yociing cingra i, patikong to cingra to sakakaay a wawa ni Elizabeth II ci Wiese, I Sen-Paw-lo tata'akay a kiwkay ko pitikong nangra, malakakeridan no England a kitakit, o tadakahemekan to tamdamdaw. Nikaorira, caay ka fangcal ko kalaramod ni Diana aci Wiese, iraay ko roma a fafahiyan mirawraw to kalaramod nangra, saka itini to i 1992 mihecaan satapang to malacinowas a mafoti', caay ka halafin, malacinowas to cangra i 1996 a mihecaan. Malakakeridan no kitakit ci Diana i, ciinorongay cingra to finawlan, maolah ci Diana to mato'asay ato kaemangay, o roma i, pakayni to demak no ciadadaay to no , 'alomanay to ko mafana'ay to mitayalan ningra, sa'aya'ayaw i, mangodo ho cingra a mikihatiya to ciadadaay tonian a tamdaw, mananam mananam to ko 'alomanay a tamdaw cingraan i, safangcal sato ko faloco' ningra to kalacinowas no kalalamod. kasafocan a loma' 出生家庭 Itini i 1961 a mihecaan saka pito folad saka cecay a romi'ad a hofocen ci Dayana(no Ikilis a nganga:Diana Frances Spencer), i Park House, Sandringham, Norfolk ko kahofocan ningra. lalamod 配偶 salikaka 兄弟姐妹 natayalan 事蹟 kapatayan 逝世 1997 mihacaan falo folad 31 a romi'ad to kanikaran, itini tona laloma'ay no pongkang tahasotol to paliding ko kapatay ni Diana. Oya parakatay to paliding ningra ci Hengli Polo hananay i, tangsol a mapatay, midipangay ci Dianaan a tamdaw, ci Telefo Lise CiyongSe kareteng ko doka', ladaka'ay ko tireng ningra. ira to ko roma a sowal masadak i tilifi, o mirepelan no sapilicayaw to demak ni Diana, malarepel cangara i caay ka pina'on parakat to paliding, masasontol to, onini ko kapatay ni Diana. I 1999 a maheca, ira to a makera nangra ko kacirawraw noya parakatay to paliding, koma'enay to 'epah ci Polo toya romi'ad saka malasang parakat haca to paliding, tata'akay karetengay ko raraw ningra. koma'enay ci Polo to sapitelep to katatiih no tireng ningra, latek o sapaiyo ato 'epah ko mili'angay to fongoh ningra, kali'ki sato a malasang ko fongoh ningra. I 2008 a miheca, ira to ko pisetekan no citodongay to pakayni tonian a demak, tata'akay ko raraw ni Pulo ato yamireperay cangranan a tamdaw, oya ci Telefo Lise CiyongSe midipangay ci Dianaan i, pitooran 宗教
S.PHON: == ɬ~ɮiana, prinʦəss o~uf waɾəs ******** == i **** a miħəʦa saka pito~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi ɬ~ɮiana, po~uɾo~uŋ a ŋaŋan ni ɬ~ɮiana(ikəɾis:ɾaɬ~ɮj ɬ~ɮiana franʦəs spənʦər), maɾamiko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit no~u əŋɾanɬ~ɮ, o~u saka ʦəʦaj a fafaħi ni waɾəs ħo~uŋti ʦi ɬ~ɮiana, tato~usa ko~u wawa naŋra, ʦi wiɾiən ato~u ʦi ħaɾi. o~u ʦiħaratəŋaj ʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡaj to~u pakajni to~u ɬ~ɮəmak i ħəkaɾ, kao~uɾaħan no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw ʦiŋra. kaso~ufo~uʦan ni ɬ~ɮiana itini i əŋɾanɬ~ɮ a ɾaɾo~umaan, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj a paɾatamɬ~ɮaw ʦiŋraan, i **** a miħəʦaan maɾasiŋsi ħo~u no~u jo~uʦiiŋ ʦiŋra i, patiko~uŋ to~u ʦiŋra to~u sakakaaj a wawa ni əɾi*ab~b~vətħ ii ʦi wiəsə, i sən-paw-ɾo~u tataʡakaj a kiwkaj ko~u pitiko~uŋ naŋra, maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan no~u əŋɾanɬ~ɮ a kitakit, o~u taɬ~ɮakaħəməkan to~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw. nikao~urira, ʦaaj ka faŋʦaɾ ko~u kaɾaramo~uɬ~ɮ ni ɬ~ɮiana aʦi wiəsə, iraaj ko~u ro~uma a fafaħijan mirawraw to~u kaɾaramo~uɬ~ɮ naŋra, saka itini to~u i **** miħəʦaan satapaŋ to~u maɾaʦino~uwas a mafo~utiʡ, ʦaaj ka ħaɾafin, maɾaʦino~uwas to~u ʦaŋra i **** a miħəʦaan. maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan no~u kitakit ʦi ɬ~ɮiana i, ʦiino~uro~uŋaj ʦiŋra to~u finawɾan, mao~uɾaħ ʦi ɬ~ɮiana to~u mato~uʡasaj ato~u kaəmaŋaj, o~u ro~uma i, pakajni to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj to~u no~u , ʡaɾo~umanaj to~u ko~u mafanaʡaj to~u mitajaɾan niŋra, saʡajaʡajaw i, maŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u ħo~u ʦiŋra a mikiħatija to~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj to~unian a tamɬ~ɮaw, mananam mananam to~u ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦiŋraan i, safaŋʦaɾ sato~u ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ niŋra to~u kaɾaʦino~uwas no~u kaɾaɾamo~uɬ~ɮ. kasafo~uʦan a ɾo~umaʡ **** itini i **** a miħəʦaan saka pito~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ʦəʦaj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a ħo~ufo~uʦən ʦi ɬ~ɮajana(no~u ikiɾis a ŋaŋa:ɬ~ɮiana franʦəs spənʦər), i park ħo~uo~u~usə, sanɬ~ɮriŋħam, no~urfo~uɾk ko~u kaħo~ufo~uʦan niŋra. ɾaɾamo~uɬ~ɮ ** saɾikaka **** natajaɾan ** kapatajan ** **** miħaʦaan faɾo~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u kanikaran, itini to~una ɾaɾo~umaʡaj no~u po~uŋkaŋ taħaso~uto~uɾ to~u paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ ko~u kapataj ni ɬ~ɮiana. o~uja parakataj to~u paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ niŋra ʦi ħəŋɾi po~uɾo~u ħananaj i, taŋso~uɾ a mapataj, miɬ~ɮipaŋaj ʦi ɬ~ɮianaan a tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦi təɾəfo~u ɾisə ʦijo~uŋsə karətəŋ ko~u ɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ, ɾaɬ~ɮakaʡaj ko~u tirəŋ niŋra. ira to~u ko~u ro~uma a so~uwaɾ masaɬ~ɮak i tiɾifi, o~u mirəpəɾan no~u sapiɾiʦajaw to~u ɬ~ɮəmak ni ɬ~ɮiana, maɾarəpəɾ ʦaŋara i ʦaaj ka pinaʡo~un parakat to~u paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ, masaso~unto~uɾ to~u, o~unini ko~u kapataj ni ɬ~ɮiana. i **** a maħəʦa, ira to~u a makəra naŋra ko~u kaʦirawraw no~uja parakataj to~u paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ, ko~umaʡənaj to~u ʡəpaħ ʦi po~uɾo~u to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ saka maɾasaŋ parakat ħaʦa to~u paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ, tataʡakaj karətəŋaj ko~u raraw niŋra. ko~umaʡənaj ʦi po~uɾo~u to~u sapitəɾəp to~u katatiiħ no~u tirəŋ niŋra, ɾatək o~u sapaijo~u ato~u ʡəpaħ ko~u miɾiʡaŋaj to~u fo~uŋo~uħ niŋra, kaɾiʡki sato~u a maɾasaŋ ko~u fo~uŋo~uħ niŋra. i **** a miħəʦa, ira to~u ko~u pisətəkan no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u pakajni to~unian a ɬ~ɮəmak, tataʡakaj ko~u raraw ni po~u~uɾo~u ato~u jamirəpəraj ʦaŋranan a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~uja ʦi təɾəfo~u ɾisə ʦijo~uŋsə miɬ~ɮipaŋaj ʦi ɬ~ɮianaan i, pito~uo~uran **
